channel.title: MindGains Editorial
channel.description: Essays on Indian learning habits, exams, current affairs, quiz practice and AI in education.

item.title: India Has More Educational Content Than Ever. So Why Are Learning Gaps Still Massive?
item.author: editorial@mindgains.ai (MindGains Editorial)
item.description: India has more lessons, videos, PDFs and test prep than ever before. The real crisis is not access to content. It is consistency, practice, feedback and revision.
